title: The Magic Forest Photo Tour
summary: On a special Picture Day in the Magic Forest, Hattie the Mouse and Izzy the Kiddo team up to capture portraits of their magical neighbors. Their journey takes them from Hattie's hollow tree workshop to the heights of the Wizard's Castle to visit Peacock the Wizard. Guided by a series of detailed maps, the photography team travels through jungles, over mountains, and past the mysterious Lions Stool to reach the colorful homes of Mischief Mouse and Dr. Victor, ensuring everyone in the forest gets their moment in the spotlight.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Move this way.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, can you give me my little camera?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay now it's time for Hattie Mouse. Stars and stories about Hattie the mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hattie stand stay still Hattie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh it was a very big day for Hattie Mouse. It was picture day. Now who was coming over to Hattie's house to take pictures? Was it Izzy the kiddo?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. Hattie stay still, I'm here to take your picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay wait wait wait. I gotta pick my best hat for the picture. Which one should I pick?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The blue and red and orange and yellow one.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The blue and red and orange and yellow one. Okay. Yeah that one has a right wide brim and a pointy top. I'll put it on. Okay and Hattie put on her special hat and she got it placed just right on her head and she stood up straight and she brushed herself off and she said, "Okay I'll stand right here in front of my workshop and smile for the picture." And you... oh did you already take it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. I took it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: How'd it come out?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It came out great.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh thanks for taking the picture Izzy the kiddo, said Hattie Mouse. What are we going to use the picture for?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: We could make a big print of it and put it on the wall, or use it as a gift for someone.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Use it as a gift for someone.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh who could we give it to as a gift? Hmm. Do you think Peacock the Wizard would like it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Oh let's make one for Peacock the Wizard and take his picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh I bet Peacock the Wizard would like to have his picture taken too, Izzy the kiddo. Let's go to the Wizard's castle. Do you remember how to get there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know. I can't do it. I have to read a map.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well I happen to have a map right here, said Hattie. And she went into her house and dug around in a cabinet and she said [clank clank clank] oh maybe it's under this thing... [thump crash]... oh here it is. And then she reached up on top of a shelf and pulled down a big folded up sheet of paper and she unfolded it three times [whoosh whoosh whoosh] to make it really big and she said, "Okay here is the map of the Magic Forest that we all live in."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And let's see, near the middle here is a little circle that shows the hollow tree. That's my workshop. See it says right there in the map, Hattie's Hollow Tree Workshop. And then way over here on the other side, there's a path that comes out of the forest and then it goes up a big hill and at the top of the hill, you know what's there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You see there's this picture of a castle. That's the Wizard's castle. And it has a tower and at the top of the tower, that's where we can find Peacock the Wizard. Okay now we know how to get there.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then I'll knock on the door, knock knock, I'll knock five times to answer.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh okay. And so Izzy the kiddo and Hattie the mouse went through the forest along the path and out of the forest and they continued up the hill and at the top of the hill was the big castle and the big castle had big wooden doors in the front. And Izzy the kiddo, did you knock five times?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock knock.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And suddenly there was a big noise from inside. Boom, boom, boom. And then a [elephant noise] "Who's there?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's me and Hattie and Mickey and Minnie and Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the doors were poked open by a long grey trunk and it was the elephant. What was the elephant's name?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "I'm the Gatekeeper Elephant," said the elephant. "Who goes there?" And Hattie the mouse said, "Oh it's me Hattie and this is my friend Izzy the kiddo. I guess we also have our friends Mickey and Minnie and Mole." And Mole said, "Yeah me too." And the elephant said, "Well you may come in." And the elephant opened the doors wide and everyone went into the castle.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well where do we begin? We have to take the Wizard's picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the elephant said, "Ah the Wizard is at home upstairs at the top of his tower. You may follow those stairs up to visit Peacock the Wizard."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, is he up in the attic?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, yes. Sometimes he calls his tower top room the attic. And so Hattie the mouse and Izzy the kiddo and all their friends climbed around and around the spiral staircase to go all the way to the top of the tower and there they saw the beautiful bird wizard wearing a beautiful hat that Hattie had made for him. And Peacock said, "Oh hello everyone, welcome to my tower. What can I do for you today?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well you don't have to do anything for us, we just have to take your picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh I'd be delighted to have someone take a picture of me and I have this beautiful hat to wear that was made by you for me Hattie the mouse, thanks again. Okay here, I'll just pose with my stack of magical books right next to my magical chair and I'll stand right here so I get some nice light from the sun through the window. Okay I'm ready for my picture," said Peacock.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [camera sound] Oh you took the picture. Thanks. How'd it come out?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It came out good. Would Mr. Slinger want one? I think he's squeaking for a picture. Squeak! Squeak!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh I think you're right. Mr. Slinger's right over there in the corner. He's a little mouse, but if you get down on the floor I bet you could get a good picture of him.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah I think I am.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Go ahead.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [camera sound] Oh sounds like you took the picture. Well thanks for coming over everyone said Peacock the Wizard.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's do a picture of... now let's do a picture of Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh well we'll have to go to Mischief Mouse's house.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have a map. Pretend pop, roll up, unroll the map. And went through the woodsie, through the jungle, take the garden path, around the, around the road, down the highway, up the mountain.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then past the, and then past the lions stool and then you'll be there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Hattie the mouse said, "Oh you're right. It is a long journey to Mischief's house but let's get going so we can be there by dinnertime." And so all the friends clattered down the spiral staircase steps of Peacock's tower and then went out the huge doors of the castle and then they ran down the path through the forest and through the jungle and up and down mountains and around the garden path and past the lions stool and all the way reading their map to Mischief Mouse's house. And what kind of a house did Mischief Mouse live in?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A dotted house with purple stripes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow I didn't know Mischief Mouse lives in a dotted house with purple stripes. And is it a small house or a big house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's a gigantic house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Really? And does Mischief Mouse live alone there or with other creatures?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He lives with Fox's mom and Reata the Sat and Neto and Nana and Wellesta his grandpa.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wellesta is his grandpa, oh I see. Well they arrived at Mischief Mouse's gigantic purple dotted house. I imagined it being purple.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they rang the doorbell and what sound did the doorbell make? It was a special...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Bing bong bingo Esta!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the doorbell went as it always does, bing bong bingo Esta, and then the door squeaked open and Mischief Mouse was there and said, "Oh hello everybody."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I have to take your picture Mischief.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh okay, here let me just step outside and hmm where do you think would look nice? Maybe I'll stand in front of this tree. Okay I'm ready."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [camera sound] The picture came out good.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: "Oh great. I love having my picture taken," said Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: To the robots! No just Victor wants to get his picture taken. Oh yeah I got another map, it was an old map I got from Dr. Boozen, my doctor. Got it time, around the hall, down the stairs, around the garden, past the tree trunk, past my night light, through a bedroom and then past the lions stool, down the closet hall, through out the doorway, down the path, across the street, up the highway, down the hill, on top of a mountain you'll find Victor's house and it's pink dotted with purple glitter.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the adventurers set out to go on that long journey to get to Victor's house so they could take his picture. But we'll have to tell the story of that journey another time because now we're out of time for Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay I'll turn the light back on and now it's time to...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But can we do the finger puppets please?

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

characters.name: Peacock the Wizard
characters.description: Once a deep-ocean companion to Seeker, this vibrant bird wizard now serves as the charismatic host of the magical castle’s grand show. From a cozy nest atop a soaring tower, they orchestrate wonder through balloon school arts—transmuting rubber into succulent strawberries—while proudly sporting a magnificent hat gifted by Hattie and Izzy. A playful visionary of dreamer magic and a tireless seeker of rare diamond-shaped potions, they use their stage to beckon heroes into a world of soaring imagination, often dispatching them on whimsical quests to recover enchanted new hats for their growing collection.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Gatekeeper Elephant
characters.description: The elephant who guards the doors to the Wizard's castle.

characters.name: Mr. Slinger
characters.description: A tiny resident of the Wizard’s tower’s dusty alcoves, this mouse has become a living gallery for Haddy’s craft, its humble nest and small frame now elegantly adorned with miniature masterpieces and vibrant, hand-crafted decorations.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Fox's mom
characters.description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

characters.name: Reata
characters.description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

characters.name: Neto
characters.description: One of the residents of Mischief Mouse's house.

characters.name: Nana
characters.description: The dignified mole matriarch and grandmother to Hattie, Pistis, and Isabella, this pillar of watchful wisdom resides at the end of the train line, tackling life’s problems "one at a time." From engineering mouse-scale Lego structures to the meticulous restoration of dollhouses using patient glue and tiny pencils, her steady paws bridge the gap between architectural feats and delicate artistry. Whether discerning potential as a trolley passenger or welcoming weary travelers into her sanctuary, her quiet authority is so legendary that she graces the cover of Hattie’s book in a rare, peaceful slumber. Even in rest, she remains the heart of their world—a steady warmth anchoring every journey’s end, her sharp eyes softening for Izzy’s mushroom-textured crafts.

characters.name: Victor
characters.description: Clad in blue shorts and a purple shirt, Lily’s brother is a tiny baby mouse and spirited cosmic stowaway who once served as a royal gardener within the Magic Forest’s glitter-shimmering houses. Now a rugged driver of a tow truck in the big car race, he balances his mechanical duties with a quest for a celestial watering can and the composition of percussive ‘bamp-bam-bum’ beats for space-faring worms. Though he treasures the sparkly art of Uncle Grisco and Haddy, his high-speed adventures often result in muddy messes that necessitate restorative baths, leaving him in singular pursuit of the perfect hat to complete his interstellar ensemble.

characters.name: Dr. Boozen
characters.description: Izzy's doctor who gave her an old map.

places.name: Hattie's Hollow Tree Workshop
places.description: The starting point of the journey, where Hattie the mouse works.

places.name: The Wizard's Castle
places.description: Crowned upon a hill, the gray stone castle is distinguished by its tall turrets and a soaring tower, the lofty home where Peacock the Wizard resides behind a beautiful wooden door.

places.name: Mischief Mouse's Gigantic Dotted House
places.description: A large house with purple stripes and a unique 'Bing bong bingo Esta' doorbell.

places.name: Lions Stool
places.description: A landmark in the Magic Forest mentioned in multiple maps.

places.name: Victor's House
places.description: Perched atop a mountain peak dusted in shimmering purple glitter, the mouse’s rosy pink house sits nestled within the long shadow of the neighboring Wizard’s castle.
